parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page number your are on.

parameters.name: SizePage
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return.

parameters.name: IdCustomer
parameters.description: Filter ressources by customer Id.

parameters.name: ReferenceCustomer
parameters.description: Filter ressources by customer reference.

parameters.name: StateCustomer
parameters.description: Filter ressources by customer status.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Filter ressources by name.

parameters.name: Email
parameters.description: Filter ressources by email.

parameters.name: Language
parameters.description: Filter ressources by language ISO code.

schema.description:
Allow to get detailed subresources about customer.

| Key | Description |
|---|---|
| all | Add all subressources.|
| AddressBilling | Add billing address related to customer who paid the subscription.|
| CustomerBalance | add current customer balance content.|
| CustomerBilling | add current custome billing.|
| CustomerSubscription | add subscription related to the customer.|
| Segment | Add details about the related segment.|
| SettingsPayment | Add details about the payment settings related to the customer.|
| UserCreation | Add details about the user who created the ressource.|
| UserUpdate | Add details about the user who last updated the ressource.|
schema.title: CustomerExtra

parameters.name: FirstName
parameters.description: Filter ressources by firstname in address.

parameters.name: LastName
parameters.description: Filter ressources by lastname in address.

parameters.name: AddressLine1
parameters.description: Filter ressources by address street name.

parameters.name: AddressLine2
parameters.description: Filter ressources by address street additional information.

parameters.name: Country
parameters.description: Filter ressources by address country ISO code (ISO 3166-2).

parameters.name: Region
parameters.description: Filter ressources by address  region name.

parameters.name: City
parameters.description: Filter ressources by address city name.

parameters.name: BillingZipCode
parameters.description: Filter ressources by address zip code.

parameters.name: Company
parameters.description: Filter ressources by company name in address.

parameters.name: IdSegment
parameters.description: Filter ressources by segment Id.

parameters.name: ReferenceSegment
parameters.description: Filter by segment Reference

parameters.name: IdBusiness
parameters.description: Filter ressources by business Id.

parameters.name: IdUserCreation
parameters.description: Filter by the id of the user who created the ressource.

parameters.name: DateCreationMin
parameters.description: Filter resources created from the selected date.

parameters.name: DateCreationMax
parameters.description: Filter resources created until the selected date.

parameters.name: IdUserUpdate
parameters.description: Filter by user id who made the last modification

parameters.name: DateUpdateMin
parameters.description: Filter resources updated after the selected date.

parameters.name: DateUpdateMax
parameters.description: Filter resources updated before the selected date.

parameters.name: IdGatewayPermission
parameters.description: Filter ressources by gateway permission Id.

parameters.name: TypePayment
parameters.description: Filter by payment type.

schema.description:
Type of payment

| Status | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Free | Subscription is free, no payment ever requested. |
| ExternalCheck | Payment with check. |
| ExternalCash | Payment with cash. |
| ExternalBank | Payment by wire transfer. |
| ExternalOther | Other payment type. |
| Card | Payment with payment card, automated renewal. |
| DirectDebit | Payment with bank account info, automated renewal. |
schema.title: PaymentTypes

parameters.name: IsGreyListed
parameters.description: If true return customers place in grey list, if not those which are not.
